div.head: Article 511
div.p:
512
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
Biochet 68 Biuraspi 162 Biwraspi 162 Blanc 161 Blochet 65 Boyce 145 Braginskiï 161 Brentjes 295 Brockelmann 297 Brocklemann 297 Brown 114 Caire 295 Calcutta 296 California 4 Californie 292 Carminati 463 Caucase 164, 293 Chalathianz 141, 153, 156, 160, 163 Charles 65, 67 Chorenaçi 351 Cilicie 294, 299, 300, 304 Clavijo 294 Columelle 297 Comnène 294 Connecticut 407 Constantin 295 Conybeare 488 Cronide 161 Dabavand 160, 161
